Nexus Card Executive Briefing Request Briefing
Strategic Transformations URI-rooted leadership architecture

Embedded Strategic Partnership for Leadership Architecture

I help leadership teams identify and correct the structural misalignment driving burnout and execution risk.

This is an embedded strategic partnership anchored in the Unmasking Restore Intelligence (URI) framework. We work inside real decision environments to reduce leadership architecture risk, restore authority-accountability alignment, and protect human sustainability.

A Strategic Transformations embedded partnership model

Access is curated. Fractional, Recalibration, and Stabilization engagements are scoped by fit.

See the three lanes Go to the inquiry form
Three Lanes

Clear boundaries. Clear outcomes.

These lanes are designed to match organizational need: embedded decision partnership, intensive structural redesign, and ongoing post-recalibration guardrails.

Lane 1

Fractional Advisory

Embedded, inside-the-room leadership support for ongoing decision-making, authority alignment, and execution continuity.

$7,500 - $15,000+ / month

Lane 2

UNMASK Recalibration

A 90-day high-intensity project that redesigns authority, accountability, and structural flow across leadership systems.

$45,000+ / 90 days

Lane 3

UNMASK Stabilization

Post-recalibration maintenance lane that keeps new leadership architecture stable through guardrails and strategic oversight.

$7,500 / month

Industry Focus

Current sector emphasis: Healthcare, Tech, Finance, and Nonprofits. In many of these environments, burnout pressure is currently estimated in the 70-85% range, making leadership architecture risk a live operational issue rather than a culture side topic.

Three engagement tiers

One lane. Three levels of depth.

Each tier is designed with clear boundaries, curated access, and intentional capacity limits. Not every engagement will be the right fit — and that is by design.

Tier 0 · Open Enrollment

Strategic Reset Intensive

A curated small-group cohort for women navigating burnout, over-responsibility, and AI-era strain. One reset. Real tools. Clear next steps.

$247 · Group cohort

$997 · VIP add-on available

One cohort per quarter · Next: May 21

See Tier 0 details

Tier 1 · By Invitation

Premium Intensive

A private, deep-dive intensive for women who need more than a group reset — personalized strategic architecture, decision clarity, and execution support.

$6,500 · Base intensive

+ Follow-up: $1,500 · Team workshop: $3,500

Two slots per month maximum

See Tier 1 details

Tier 3 · By Invitation

Fractional Strategic Advisory

Ongoing embedded advisory for organizations navigating structural change, leadership transitions, and AI-era complexity — from the inside.

$10K–$20K · Monthly retainer

Segmented by org stage and sector

One client at a time

See Tier 3 details
Tier 0 · Open Enrollment Strategic Reset Intensive

A Strategic Reset Intensive for women who refuse to be the load-bearing wall of the AI era.

This is a curated small-group cohort for women navigating over-responsibility, under-support, and the pressure to keep performing in systems that were never designed for their sustainability.

You will leave with a personal AI governance boundary, a practical AI operating system, and an execution plan that turns uncertainty into movement — without sacrificing your nervous system, your integrity, or your voice.

A limited VIP add-on is available for women who want private follow-up, tailored application, or a deeper 1:1 reset after the group intensive — details on the Strategic Reset Intensive page.

Phase 1

Diagnostic Pre-Work

A short intake and reflection process to surface burnout patterns, authority mismatch, hidden labor, masking pressure, and AI strain before the live intensive.

Phase 2

Live Group Reset

One 2-hour strategic small-group intensive designed to help participants name structural strain, clarify current reality, and identify the highest-leverage moves forward.

Phase 3

Reset Tools

A practical reset framework including AI boundaries, execution priorities, and next-step prompts you can use immediately after the session.

Included

UNMASK Blueprint Vol. 1

Deconstruction of the Grind, including the accompanying interactive web experience.

Upcoming Cohort Dates

Q2

May 21, 2025

Spring cohort — limited seats

Q3

August 20, 2025

Summer cohort — limited seats

One cohort per quarter. Each cohort is small by design. Seats are not guaranteed until enrollment is confirmed.

Investment

Group Cohort

Full cohort experience + reset tools + UNMASK Blueprint

$247

VIP Add-On

Group cohort + private follow-up + tailored 1:1 application

$997

Payment link shared after fit confirmation. One-cohort-per-quarter limit applies.

Apply for the Strategic Reset Intensive

Applications reviewed on a rolling basis. Not every inquiry will be advanced. This is a protected entry point, not an open marketplace.

Protected Access

Tier 1 is available by invitation only. If you have been directed here by Nikki or a trusted referral, the inquiry form below is your right next step. This offering is not listed as an open-access service.

Tier 1 · By Invitation Premium Intensive

A private deep-dive for women who need more than a reset.

The Premium Intensive is a high-proximity, single-session engagement designed for women navigating complex leadership transitions, organizational strain, or strategic pivots that require more precision than a group format can provide.

This is personalized strategic architecture — not a coaching call, not a one-size-fits-all framework. You will leave with a clear diagnostic, a decision framework, and a next-step plan built for your specific context.

Two slots available per month. This is not a marketing tactic. It is a capacity boundary that protects the quality of every engagement.

Premium Intensive

$6,500

The core engagement. A private, intensive session with customized pre-work, deep diagnostic, and a personalized execution architecture.

Follow-Up Session

$1,500 add-on

A private follow-up session for participants who need strategic check-in, course correction, or continued accountability after the intensive.

Team Workshop

$3,500 add-on

An organizational extension workshop to bring strategic clarity and shared language to your leadership team or direct reports.

Two Tier 1 engagements per month maximum. Add-ons available exclusively to current Tier 1 participants. Payment and intake details shared after fit is confirmed.

Request Premium Intensive Details

By invitation only. Inquiries reviewed before any engagement details are shared.

Protected Access

Tier 3 is available by referral and invitation only. This is a one-client-at-a-time advisory relationship and is not listed as an open-access service. If you have been directed here by Nikki or a trusted source, the inquiry form is your right next step.

Tier 3 · By Invitation Fractional Strategic Advisory

Embedded advisory for organizations navigating structural change from the inside.

The Fractional Strategic Advisory is an ongoing embedded relationship — not a retainer for periodic advice, but a sustained presence inside your organizational decision-making structure. Nikki works alongside leadership to name what is structural, recover what has been hidden, and build systems that don't depend on one person's overfunctioning to hold together.

This engagement is rooted in the URI framework — a liberation-centered architecture for organizational change that centers sustainability, equity, and structural honesty rather than performance and speed.

One client at a time. This is not a scalability play. It is a commitment to depth.

Monthly Retainer Segments

Early Stage / Nonprofit

$10,000/mo

For mission-driven organizations, early-stage companies, and nonprofits navigating structural transition with limited executive bandwidth.

Growth / Mid-Size

$15,000/mo

For growing organizations that have outpaced their structural foundation and need embedded advisory to stabilize, reorient, and build with more integrity.

Corporate / Enterprise

$20,000/mo

For larger organizations navigating complex structural change, leadership misalignment, or AI-era disruption at scale.

One Tier 3 client at a time. Pricing is segmented by organizational stage and sector, not deliverable volume. Engagement terms shared during fit conversation.

Inquire About Strategic Advisory

By referral and invitation only. Inquiries screened before engagement details are shared.

Protected Entry Point

Fractional Lane Studio Inquiry

This is the first step for Tier 1 and Tier 3 inquiries. Select the offering you are inquiring about, then complete the form. Every submission is reviewed individually before any next steps are shared.

Tier 1 and Tier 3 inquiries are only advanced if you have been personally directed here. If you are interested in the Strategic Reset Intensive (group cohort or VIP add-on), apply on the intensive landing page instead of this form.

00 — Which Offering Are You Inquiring About?

Select one. Your choice personalizes the questions that follow.

01 — Contact + Current Season

Tell me who you are and what season you are in.

02 — What You Are Navigating

Help me understand the shape of the strain.

03 — Organizational Context

Help me understand the organizational landscape you are navigating.

04 — AI + Offer Fit

Help me understand how AI and readiness are showing up for you.

Important: Submitting this form begins a conversation — not a transaction. Each inquiry is reviewed individually. Not every inquiry will be advanced, and that is not a reflection of your worth. It is a reflection of fit, timing, and capacity. If this container is not the right fit right now, you will be directed to a better next step.

About the Work

Learn more about Nikki Cates

Nikki Cates is a liberation-centered strategist, author, and organizational architect whose work sits at the intersection of structural burnout, leadership sustainability, and the AI era. She developed the Unmasking Restore Intelligence (URI) framework to help women and organizations name what is structural, recover what has been hidden, and build leadership systems that don't depend on someone's overfunctioning to hold together.

Her work through Strategic Transformations addresses the root causes of burnout, authority mismatch, and AI-era strain — not just the symptoms. If you are encountering this page for the first time, the books and ST resources are a strong and accessible starting point.

Explore the Books Main Site

Not ready to inquire yet?

Stay connected through the Unbothered Collective newsletter — strategic clarity, structural honesty, and liberation-centered leadership for women navigating the AI era. No performance. No hustle culture. Just truth and direction.
